creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-03-24 16:26:00 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/p5-HTTP-Daemon-SSL Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  HTTP::Daemon::SSL - a simple http server class with SSL support.
  Instances of the HTTP::Daemon::SSL class are HTTP/1.1 servers
  that listen on a socket for incoming requests.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/HTTP-Daemon-SSL/
  
  PR:             ports/132810
  Submitted by:   Mykola Marzhan <delgod at portaone.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2302    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/www/p5-HTTP-Daemon-SSL/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/p5-HTTP-Daemon-SSL/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/p5-HTTP-Daemon-SSL/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/www/p5-HTTP-Daemon-SSL/pkg-plist (new)
